description: DatoCMS front-end integrations for existing web projects (Next.js App Router, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Astro, plus React/Vue/Svelte component usage). Use when users ask to set up draft mode endpoints, Web Previews preview-links APIs, Content Link visual editing, real-time preview updates/subscriptions, or cache-tag invalidation/revalidation flows (Next.js revalidateTag or CDN purge by tags). Also use for framework component/hook wiring with react-datocms, vue-datocms, @datocms/svelte, and @datocms/astro: Image/SRCImage/datocms-image, StructuredText, VideoPlayer (React/Vue/Svelte), SEO/meta helpers (renderMetaTags/toHead/Seo), QuerySubscription/QueryListener realtime patterns, ContentLink components, and Site Search (React/Vue).

results.query: I need to set up draft mode for my Next.js App Router site with DatoCMS. I want enable/disable route handlers, a dual-token executeQuery wrapper, and the cookie-based draft detection. Can you generate all the files?
how do i use the react-datocms Image component to show responsive images with blur-up placeholders? i have the graphql fragment but im not sure how to wire it up in my Next.js page component

I'm building a Nuxt 3 site with DatoCMS and I need to set up the Web Previews plugin integration. Editors should be able to click 'Open preview' in the CMS and see the draft page. I need the preview-links API endpoint.
Can you help me set up Content Link for my SvelteKit site? I want editors in draft mode to be able to click on content elements and jump directly to the corresponding record in DatoCMS for editing.

I need real-time content updates on my Astro site when in draft mode. When an editor changes content in DatoCMS, the preview page should update immediately without a page refresh. Using SSE subscriptions.
how do i render DatoCMS structured text in my Vue 3 app using vue-datocms? i have custom blocks (code_block and call_to_action) and inline records that need special rendering
I want to use the @datocms/svelte package to render responsive images and video players in my SvelteKit app. Can you show me how to import and use the Image and VideoPlayer components?

Setting up my Astro site with DatoCMS. I need the executeQuery helper to fetch content, and I want to handle both published and draft content based on whether draft mode is active. Using @datocms/astro.
How do I set up cache tag invalidation for my Next.js site with DatoCMS? I want granular revalidation so when a blog post changes, only that page gets revalidated, not the entire site.

i need to render the SEO meta tags from datocms in my nuxt 3 app. the _seoMetaTags field returns title, description, og:image etc. how do i use the useHead composable with the toHead helper from vue-datocms?
I need to create 300 product records in DatoCMS programmatically from a CSV file. Each product has a name, price, description, and image URL. Can you write the import script using the CMA client?
How do I query all blog posts from DatoCMS using the Content Delivery API GraphQL endpoint? I need filtering by category and cursor-based pagination.
I want to build a custom field extension plugin for DatoCMS that renders a map picker. The editor clicks on a map to select coordinates. Using the plugin SDK connect() function.
can you help me write a datocms migration script that adds a 'featured' boolean field to my article model and sets it to true for the 10 most recent articles?
I need to upload images to DatoCMS from external URLs, set alt text, and link them to product records. Using the CMA client's uploads API.
How do I fork my DatoCMS environment, make schema changes via the CMA, and then promote it to primary? I want to do this in a CI pipeline.
I'm building a React app with Tailwind CSS and need to create a responsive navigation component with a mobile hamburger menu. No CMS involved, just pure frontend.
Can you help me set up a Strapi headless CMS with Next.js? I need to fetch content from Strapi's REST API and display it in my pages.
